channel.title: Platform Engineering on Mike Ball
channel.description: Recent content in Platform Engineering on Mike Ball

item.title: Notes on Implementing Backstage
item.description: Some notes on my experience implementing Backstage for a large engineering organization.

item.title: Extending the gh CLI with Go
item.description: Some introductory tips on building gh CLI extensions in Go.

item.title: What is the Kubernetes controller pattern?
item.description: An introduction to the Kubernetes controller pattern.

item.title: What is the Kubernetes Operator Pattern?
item.description: An introduction to the Kubernetes operator pattern.

item.title: Advanced Terraform Logic
item.description: A case study illustrating Terraform techniques for expressing moderately complex business logic.
